rationale: No conflict. The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §21.042 governs educator certification rule approval procedures—an unrelated subject matter.
quote: The State Board for Educator Certification must submit a written copy of each rule it proposes to adopt to the State Board of Education for review.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no interaction exists.
